app.name: Binaural Beats - Sleep
app.description: Fall asleep faster. Focus sharper. Relax deeper. Binaural frequencies guide brain states for sleep, focus, relaxation, meditation, healing, and energy.
app.audience: People struggling with sleep, focus, studying, stress, or relaxation routines.
app.problem: People cannot reliably switch into the right mental state for sleep, focus, and calm with simple repeatable habits.
app.differentiator: Scientifically tuned binaural programs with category-based sessions, personalization, and effortless bedtime flow.
app.visualStyle: minimal, emotional, bold, informative, organic, calm
app.valueProposition: Fall asleep faster, focus deeper, and relax on demand with science-backed binaural sessions.
app.toneHint: minimal, emotional, bold, informative, organic, calm
